items.text: 现在，让我们简单了解一下动作捕捉工作流程，自上而下地了解您需要知道的内容 So now let's take a brief look at the motion capture workflow, a top-down view of what you need to know 如果您想将动作捕捉动画应用到虚幻引擎中的角色。 if you wanted to take motion capture animation and apply it to characters inside of Unreal Engine. 因此，我们有两种方法来实现这一点，一种是我们需要动画资产，另一种是使用 So the two ways that we'll do this is we'll need our animation assets and we're going to use a 系统，称为 IK 重定向。因此，IK 重定向允许我们将动画从一个骨架 system called IK retargeting. So IK retargeting allows us to transfer animations from one skeleton 到另一个。因此，如果你还记得，动画是锁定在一个特定的骨架上的。因此 IK to another. So if you remember earlier, animations are locked to one specific skeleton. So IK 重定向允许我们将动画从一个骨架转移到另一个骨架。我们通过 retargeting allows us to transfer animations from one skeleton to another. And we do this through 我们将在虚幻中创建两个资产，分别称为 IK rigs 和 IK retargeters。因此，这是一个 two assets that we'll create inside of Unreal called IK rigs and IK retargeters. So this is a 是虚幻 5 中的新系统，IK 代表逆运动学。因此，IK 重定向器是一个新的 new system in Unreal 5 and the IK just stands for inverse kinematics. So the IK retargeter is a new 工具集用于在虚幻 5 中重定向动画。过去您还可以使用其他方法 tool set for retargeting animations in Unreal 5. There were other methods you could use in the past 但如果您使用的是虚幻 5，这绝对是在引擎中实现这一切的最佳方法。我们只是 but if you're using Unreal 5 this is definitely the best way to do it all in Engine. Now this will typically happen because the root bone is actually on the ground for some rigs 而其他人则以臀部为中心，在这种情况下，您需要将根设置为 "无"。 while others have it centered around the hips in which case you want to set your root to none if 之所以如此，是因为我们不想重新映射，因为动画不兼容 that is the case because we don't want to remap that because the the animation isn't compatible 一对一的情况。另一个原因是重定向根节点没有设置为 one-to-one in cases like that. And the other reason is because this retarget root isn't set 在 IK 钻机中是正确的。因此，在这里我们可以看到，我们的臀部就是我们想要的重定向路线 correctly in the IK rig. So here we can see that our hips are what we want our retarget route to be 你可以右键单击任何骨骼，将其作为重定向根，我们可以看到这里已经设置好了 you can right click any bone and make that the retarget root and we can see here it's set up 正确，因为我将我们的臀部设置为重定向根目录，但原始装备本身实际上 correctly because I have our hips set to the retarget root but the original rig itself actually 有这样一个问题，即我们将根或参考骨设置为地板，因此在这种情况下 has that problem where we have the root or the reference bone set to the floor so in this case 我们不想让它成为重定向根目录，因此我们将臀部设置为重定向根目录，然后 we didn't want that to be the retarget root we set our hips to be the retarget root and that 在你满意的情况下，你就可以让它们正常走动了。一旦您满意 corrected the issue and allowed both of them to walk around correctly. And then once you're happy 通过重定向，您可以导出任何选定的动画，我通常只需在动画中添加一个 with the retarget you can export any of these selected animations and I usually just add an 下划线重定向后缀。然后，我们将这些动画带回到 underscore retarget suffix to any animation.
